text: Good morning Jarvis! What's on the calendar for this Friday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Friday, March 28. You have backlog grooming with Greg at 1 PM, and Lily needs to be picked up from daycare.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Reviewing my sleep tracker logs. The pediatrician says Lily is growing on track. Need to focus on recovery.
title: Health Update

text: Got it, Mike. Great consistency with running. Excellent news. The pediatric report is saved in Lily's folder. Keep stretching that knee!
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Sarah and I are looking at home listings in Frisco online. First United Mortgage offered 5.75% with zero points. Every bit of savings helps.
title: Finance Update

text: Interesting. Budget tracking is updated. A rate of 5.75% is a big drop from 6.5%. I'll calculate your savings. Let me know when you want to execute.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick update: Wrote a custom vector memory index tool. Building humidity sensors for the greenhouse. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: I checked the telemetry feeds. ESP32 sensor soldering is a fun project. I can fetch pinout diagrams. I can pull more research papers.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. Lily fell asleep immediately holding her stuffed elephant. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. That sounds like a sweet moment. A calm routine makes all the difference. Nice contrast to the tantrums. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: I'm reviewing the scheduling portal specs for Vertex Health. We got beta feedback from clinics suggesting they need scheduling portal immediately. This could be a blocker for the Vertex Health launch.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. I checked the recent logs for that. We should prioritize these clinic requests. Let's create a dedicated sub-task in the CareConnect backlog. I can prep some talking points for your meeting with Anika.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Hey Jarvis, We're talking about Ethan's academic progress. He is asking lots of questions about exoplanet atmospheric compositions. He is really putting in the effort.
title: Kids School Update

text: Great update. That's a great interest. I can summarize the atmosphere of Venus in a kid-friendly way. His curiosity is really impressive.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Anika and I were mapping out the sprint goals. We got beta feedback from clinics suggesting they need billing integration immediately. Greg is not going to like this, but we have to push back.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. We should prioritize these clinic requests. Let's create a dedicated sub-task in the CareConnect backlog. I'll save this reasoning in our engineering scratchpad.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick update: Reviewing my sleep tracker logs. I hit 18 miles of running this week. Will keep monitoring the metrics.
title: Health Update

text: I've logged your vitals. Great progress! The consistent stretching is keeping you stable. I've saved the checkup notes.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Jarvis, Planning for future education costs. They requested our W-2 and bank statements. Glad we are staying on top of this.
title: Finance Update

text: Got it, Mike. Smart financial planning. I have prepared a checklist of documents in your shared folder. I'll archive the documentation.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick log: Reading scientific papers late tonight. Spectrometry data for K2-18b is fascinating. Lost track of time, it's 2 AM now.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Understood. Space science and tech is a great focus. K2-18b atmospheric profiles are a milestone. I'll fetch companion papers. I can pull more research papers.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Hey Jarvis, We brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. Lily fell asleep immediately holding her stuffed elephant. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. That sounds like a sweet moment. A calm routine makes all the difference. Nice contrast to the tantrums. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: Working on the roadmap slides for Q4. I am negotiating my senior PM salary and signing the Vertex Health offer letter. We need to back this up with solid performance metrics.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. Here is what I recommend. Negotiation is key. Ensure the relocation package covers the Chicago to Frisco move. Would you like me to draft a summary for Greg?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick update: We're talking about Ethan's academic progress. He is asking lots of questions about exoplanet atmospheric compositions. He is growing up so fast.
title: Kids School Update

text: Sure thing! School projects are fun. That's a great interest. I can summarize the atmosphere of Venus in a kid-friendly way. I can quiz him whenever he is ready.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Quick update: Prepping for the stakeholder meeting later today. Saying goodbye to my old colleagues in Chicago on my last day at MedFuture Systems. Anika is doing a great job managing the feedback.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. I checked the recent logs for that. It's important to keep in touch with old colleagues; they are a great professional network. Should we schedule a calendar slot to do a deep dive?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, logging today's journal. Lots of communication with Greg and Anika today. Logged my running mileage and stretched my knee. Ethan did great with his school homework. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Reflections saved. Rest up for tomorrow!
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
